name: Hubei Chutian Smart Communication Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hubei Chutian Smart Communication Co.,Ltd. focuses on the investment and development of roads, bridges, and other transportation infrastructure, China. It operates a highway connecting Wuhan and Yichang; and a highway from Dawu to Suizhou, as well as from Huangshi to Xianning. The company also engages in the development and maintenance of expressways; development of road facilities; catering accommodation along the highway, commercial entertainment, oil fuel, vehicle maintenance, tourism development, advertising media, warehousing and logistics, energy and mineral resources, leasing and other ancillary facilities management, and project management development activities; investment and development of other related industries along the road; equity investment operations; and service industry activities. The company was formerly known as Hubei Chutian Expressway Co.,Ltd. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Wuhan, China.
